zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk de Bermingham於1314年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆時，他的父親William de Bermingham26歲，母親Mathilde de Geneville23歲。他於1339年之前與Joan在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海黑瑟特享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bermingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

variants.name: Birmingham
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Corish
meanings: shortened form of Mac Fheorais ‘son of Piers’. The name was borne by a Connacht family descended from Piers de Bermingham, second lord of Athenry in Galway (died c. 1309). Compare Bermingham .
shortened form of Mac Muirghis ‘son of Maurice’, a personal name introduced to Ireland by the Normans. Compare Morrissey .

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk de Bermingham was born in 1314, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Bermingham, was 26 and his mother, Mathilde de Geneville, was 23. He married Joan before 1339, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1373, in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk de Bermingham est né en 1314, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Bermingham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Geneville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan avant 1339, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1373, à Hethersett, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk de Bermingham(이)가 1314년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Bermingham(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Geneville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1339년 이전 영국에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤더세트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk de Bermingham родился в 1314 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Bermingham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Geneville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan перед 1339 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1373 г. в местности хетирсетт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
